qa_pairs.question: How do I launch STAR-CCM+ versions 15.04.010 through 17.06.008 in serial processing mode from an OnDemand desktop?
qa_pairs.answer: To launch STAR-CCM+ versions between 15.04.010 and 17.06.008 in serial processing mode from an OnDemand desktop, first open a new terminal window. In the terminal, load the `StdEnv/2020` module (note that this environment is retired), then load either the `starccm-mixed/17.06.008` or `starccm/17.06.008-R8` module. Finally, execute the command `starccm+` to start the software in serial mode.

qa_pairs.question: What is the procedure to run STAR-CCM+ versions 15.04.010 through 17.06.008 in parallel mode on a local host when using an OnDemand desktop?
qa_pairs.answer: To run STAR-CCM+ versions from 15.04.010 through 17.06.008 in parallel mode on a local host via an OnDemand desktop, begin by opening a new terminal window. You will need to load the `StdEnv/2020` module (which is retired), followed by either the `starccm-mixed/17.06.008` or `starccm/17.06.008-R8` module. After loading the modules, use the command `starccm+ -np 2` to launch the application for parallel processing.
